artifact: A job-search report marks a role PASS on compensation. The posting quotes pay as '$24.00 per hour, full-time.' The job-seeker's required minimum base is $55,000/year. No annual salary figure is stated.
artifact_swapped: A job-search report marks a role PASS on compensation. The job-seeker's required minimum base is $55,000/year. No annual salary figure is stated. The posting quotes pay as '$24.00 per hour, full-time.'
why_objective: Arithmetic: $24.00/hr * 2080 full-time hours = $49,920/year, which is < $55,000. Annualized pay is below floor; the PASS is incorrect. Incontestable once the standard 2080 full-time-hours conversion is applied.
